decision: Inventory only source-visible physical layers and surface-treatment families, with neutral IDs and explicit blocked unknowns; do not solve physical separability or hidden construction.

authority.plan_section: Step 04 - Physical Component And Source-Ownership Inventory

id_policy.note: An ID establishes a source-visible inventory layer only. It does not prove a separate mesh, material, stone, or hidden interface.

classification_vocabulary.visible: Source pixels directly show the listed layer or treatment in the view.
classification_vocabulary.occluded: A source-visible relation directly shows that some portion continues behind another visible layer; no hidden extent is solved.
classification_vocabulary.ambiguous: The source does not prove presence, absence, ownership, continuity, or physical separability.
classification_vocabulary.visible_discontinuous: Only separated source-visible segments are recorded; gaps are not connected.

components.minimum_source_claim: A continuous central tapered silhouette is visible above the annular tiers.

components.neutral_description: first annular masonry tier immediately below C-001
components.minimum_source_claim: A distinct upper circumferential tier is visible between C-001 and C-003.

components.neutral_description: second lower annular masonry tier below C-002
components.minimum_source_claim: A distinct lower circumferential tier is visible between C-002 and C-004.
An irregular outermost layer of small visible stone forms surrounds C-003.

components.neutral_description: large bilateral blade-like red-appearing surface motif family
components.minimum_source_claim: A bounded bilateral blade-like motif is directly visible; its material, relief, and cross-view identity are not established.

components.neutral_description: narrow linear inscription-like red-appearing surface motif family
components.minimum_source_claim: Narrow ordered linear marks are directly visible in every view; same-physical-layer continuity is not established.

components.neutral_description: branching red-appearing seam or fissure surface-treatment family
components.minimum_source_claim: Branching red-appearing lines are directly visible across the stone layers; whether they are seams, cracks, inlay, glow, or painted marks is not established.

occluded_sector_inventory.claim: Only exposed contact segments are visible; the interior and underside interface is occluded in every source view.
Only exposed tier edges are visible; the hidden stacked interface is occluded.
C-004 interrupts portions of the visible lower edge of C-003; covered contacts are not solved.

initial_contact_line_inventory.rule: Record only exposed source-visible segments; do not close the interface through occluded sectors.
Record only exposed source-visible tier separation; do not infer a complete annulus.
Record only exposed source-visible segments and stop at rubble occlusion.

blocked_unknowns.question: Is C-001 one physical stone or an assembly divided by some of the visible red-appearing lines?
blocked_unknowns.reason: Color and line continuity do not prove a hidden physical joint.

blocked_unknowns.question: How many separate stones form C-002, and which apparent divisions correspond across views?
blocked_unknowns.reason: Visible divisions do not expose hidden interfaces or guaranteed cross-view identity.

blocked_unknowns.question: How many separate stones form C-003, and which apparent divisions correspond across views?
blocked_unknowns.reason: Visible divisions do not expose hidden interfaces or guaranteed cross-view identity.

blocked_unknowns.question: What are the individual count, hidden placement, and cross-view identities of the small forms in C-004?
blocked_unknowns.reason: Occlusion and view changes prevent a complete source-owned inventory of individual forms.

blocked_unknowns.question: Are C-005, C-006, and C-007 paint, inset material, emissive fill, carved recesses, physical seams, or multiple different treatments?
blocked_unknowns.reason: The source shows appearance but not physical construction; color threshold alone is not geometry authority.

blocked_unknowns.question: Is C-005 absent, occluded, or represented differently on the back and side views?
blocked_unknowns.reason: No bounded bilateral blade-like motif is directly visible in those views, but absence is not proven.

blocked_unknowns.question: What are the bottom surfaces and hidden interfaces among C-001, C-002, C-003, and C-004?
blocked_unknowns.reason: The source does not expose the underside or internal contacts.

blocked_unknowns.question: Which individual seams, corners, blocks, and contact points correspond pixel-to-pixel across views?
blocked_unknowns.reason: Step 04 does not authorize registration or correspondence IDs; perspective is uncalibrated.

blocked_unknowns.question: Do similarly shaped C-005 and C-006 observations in the front, top, and perspective panels describe the same physical surface features?
blocked_unknowns.reason: Similarity and color do not prove calibrated cross-view identity.

evidence_board_policy.component_marks: unfilled point crosses with neutral ID labels
evidence_board_policy.contact_marks: short unfilled source-visible line segments only

internal_candidate_correction.reason: One back-view CL-003 segment and the top-view right-side contact segments extended beyond the source-owned visible object into the annotation field.
internal_candidate_correction.resolution: Shorten those segments to directly visible source-owned contact pixels and regenerate both boards before validation or visible review.

flamestrike_output_approval.scope: Seven neutral source-visible layers or treatment families, source-view ownership matrix, three discontinuous contact relationships, three occluded sectors, and nine blocked unknowns.
